title: Phantom Menaces

"'''Phantom Menaces'''" was a short story in ''[[Star Wars Tales 17]]''. Set during the [[New Republic era]], it focuses on [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker's]] encounter with a [[Hologram/Legends|holographic]] representation of [[Darth/Legends|Darth]] [[Darth Maul/Legends|Maul]] on [[Iridonia/Legends|Iridonia]], leading to the revelation that Maul's brain was kept alive by [[Drell Kahmf]], and used to terrorize the planet.

==Plot summary==
{{Quote|This was no spirit from beyond the grave. It was ''tangible'' not to mention the tremor in the Force...|[[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]] - commenting on his encounter with a [[Hologram/Legends|holographic]] representation of [[Darth/Legends|Darth]] [[Darth Maul/Legends|Maul]]|<ref name="Phantom Menances">{{Tales|17|Phantom Menaces}}</ref>}}
[[File:HolographicDarthMaul.jpg|thumb|left|200px|[[Darth Maul/Legends|Darth Maul]], in the form of a [[Solid-state hologram|solid-state]] [[Hologram/Legends|hologram]], attacks [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]].]]

Luke Skywalker arrives on Iridonia as an ambassador of the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]], to partake in trade negotiations about the opening of new routes to the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim]]. As Skywalker settles in to his chambers near [[Capital Square]], he is attacked by a [[Solid-state hologram]] of Darth Maul. Postponing the negotiations, Skywalker embarks on an investigation into the [[Sith/Legends|Sith's]] presence.

Skywalker is drawn to an unnatural [[Wound in the Force/Legends|disturbance]] in the Force, and after another confrontation with Darth Maul, he eventually arrives at the laboratory of [[Drell Kahmf]]. Here, he discovers the living remains of Maul, being sustained in a device created by Kahmf. Kahmf recounts how he recovered and resuscitated Maul's brain after the loss of his body during the [[Battle of Naboo/Legends#Duel in Theed|Duel in Theed]].

Skywalker states that he will not allow Maul to remain as he is, and Kahmf flees before him as he activates his [[Lightsaber/Legends|lightsaber]]. Skywalker is left alone to finally terminate Darth Maul through the the mere act of flicking a switch.

==Continuity==
Parts of this story are [[canon]]ized with respect to the [[Star Wars Legends|''Star Wars'' Legends]] continuity by ''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]'' in its entry on [[Drell Kahmf|Kahmf, Drell]]. The Encyclopedia states that Kahmf was in possession of a "mysterious brain" that was rumored to belong to [[Darth Maul/Legends|Darth Maul]], but does not specify whether the brain actually belonged to Maul. The [[solid-state hologram]] goes unmentioned, and the technology, if it exists at all within Legends, is not mentioned at all in the Encyclopedia.
